apps.name: YouNu
apps.tagline: A conversational mirror that reflects the wisdom already within you

listing.description:
YouNu is a conversational mirror for self-reflection and personal wellbeing.
Rather than giving you answers, YouNu guides you to discover the clarity,
wisdom, and insight you already carry within yourself. Through thoughtful
conversation, YouNu helps you explore your thoughts, feelings, and intentions
at your own pace. Free to download and use, with optional in-app purchases
for extended features.
